name: fbm-sniper-community
description: Open-source multi-platform marketplace sniper — Facebook cars + WIP Wallapop, Vinted, Mercari.

scripts.check: node --check lib/scanner.js && node --check lib/fb-scraper.js && node --check lib/fb-session.js && node --check lib/vinted-sniper.js && node --check lib/wallapop-sniper.js && node --check lib/mercari-sniper.js && node --check lib/shared-marketplace/workspace.js && node --check lib/shared-marketplace/notifier.js
